data.title: Kevin O'Leary Declares 'I Am Not Ashamed Of Capitalism.' Agrees There's Anti-Elitism And Applauds Musk On Winning Compensation Case
Wall Street Shifts To 'Bossing The Fed Into Big Rate Cuts' After Bank Of Japan's Policy U-Turn, Analyst Says
data.description: BoJ's sudden U-turn on policy has sparked Wall Street reactions, with eyes on significant Fed interest rate cuts. Bank of America's Hartnett believes Wall Street influenced BoJ's decision and now aims to pressure Fed into cuts to avoid economic turmoil.

data.title: What's Going On With Canoo Shares Friday
data.description: Canoo is expected to report 2024 fiscal year second quarter earnings on Wednesday after the market closes.

data.title: What's Going On With Intel Stock?
data.description: Intel shares are trading lower by 3.1% during Friday session. The stock has been volatile since last week's disappointing Q2 earnings report.
